title: SemiHS-Bench Submission
description: Model-prediction submission format for SemiHS-Bench (schema_version 2.0.0). Each submission reports one (mode, tier) run. Predictions may optionally carry cited_evidence_ids and a short rationale; neither is scored by default.

name.description: Short label for this submission, e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-7-constrained-tier1'

mode.description: Eval mode: 'constrained' = rank the 4 candidates per record; 'open' = rank from the full HS6 taxonomy

tier.description: Which input tier was evaluated (1 = full natural-language description; 2 = minimal MPN / short descriptor + manufacturer)

notes.description: Optional free-text describing the run (prompt version, temperature, system prompt hash, etc.)

frozen_id.description: Record identifier matching the frozen_id field in the dataset file (e.g. 'v2.0.eval.0001').

ranked_codes.description: Ranked HS6 codes, most likely first. For constrained mode this MUST be a permutation of the record's candidate_set.codes. For open mode this may be any non-empty prefix of the full HS6 taxonomy ranking; scoring uses top-1/top-3/top-5 and MRR.

cited_evidence_ids.description: OPTIONAL: model-cited reference-corpus evidence_ids supporting the top-1 prediction. Reserved for a planned Evidence-Recall@k metric and currently unscored. When present, IDs must resolve in data/reference_corpus.jsonl; the scorer drops unknown IDs with a warning.

rationale_short.description: OPTIONAL: ≤200-char model-generated rationale for the top-1 prediction. Not scored; recorded for qualitative analysis.
